caption.text:
Hole player : Ruud Gullit in efootball.

They called him an all rounder until he kept showing up inside the box like a striker. That’s the beauty of a Hole Player in eFootball — unpredictable movement, perfect timing, and constant pressure on defenders. One late run is enough to change the entire game.
